title: Part Information
description: Specify what part you need and add details.

brand.title: Select Vehicle Brand
brand.description: Choose your vehicle's manufacturer to ensure part compatibility.

category.title: Select Category
category.description: Choose the category that best matches the part you need.

part_details.title: What part do you need?
part_details.description: Provide clear details about the part you're looking for.

vehicle_info.title: Vehicle Information
vehicle_info.description: Provide accurate vehicle details to ensure part compatibility.
vehicle_info.why_description: Accurate vehicle specs ensure compatible parts are recommended, saving time and avoiding mismatches.

photos.title: Photos & Media
photos.description: Add photos to help sellers understand exactly what you need.
photos.dropzone_hint: Drag images here or click to browse

review.title: Confirm your details
review.description: Review your request before publishing. Click edit to make changes.

config.part_details_desc: Tell us what part you are looking for.
config.category_desc: Pick a category to help sellers find your request.
config.vehicle_specs_desc: Provide model and year for compatibility.
config.add_media_desc: Upload photos of the part or your car.

labels.garage_picker: Pick a vehicle from your Garage

placeholders.description: Provide any specific details, OEM numbers, or special requirements.

hints.category: Choose the closest category for accurate seller matching.
hints.category_tip: Correct categorization speeds up expert matching by up to 40%.
hints.vehicle_tip: Accurate vehicle details help sellers verify part compatibility instantly.
hints.photos: Add live photos of your broken parts for best results.
hints.photos_empty: Files will be encrypted on submission
hints.status: "Broadcasting" sends your request to verified sellers instantly. Sellers can then bid with price and availability.
hints.guidelines1: Clear VIN plate photos help sellers identify OEM parts accurately.
hints.guidelines2: Specify the condition (New/Used/Genuine) in the detailed description.
hints.media_speed: High-quality photos speed up your quotes
hints.browse_drop: Tap to browse or drop here
hints.vin_help: The Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) is a unique 17-character code. You can find it on your registration document or the windshield base.
hints.description_help: Mention any specific variants, engine types, or if you need original (OEM) or aftermarket parts.

status.wait_sync: Wait while we sync to storage

dialogs.edit_description: Modify the details of your request to help sellers provide more accurate quotes.

toasts.login_required: You must be logged in to create or edit a request
